_comment: SAMPLE ComfyUI workflow (API format). Replace with your own: in ComfyUI enable dev mode → 'Save (API Format)' → overwrite this file. gen-char.mjs patches the node ids listed in pipeline/config.json (prompt text, negative, seed). Node ids below are ComfyUI's default txt2img graph. Set your real checkpoint in node 4.

inputs.text: blurry, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, lowres, chibi, off-grid noise, watermark, signature, text
